name: @hauntapi/mcp-server
description: MCP web extraction for permitted public pages. Includes no-key demo, live URL-to-JSON extraction, and honest blocked-page errors.

tools.name: try_demo_extract
tools.description: No-key activation check returning demo, docs, signup, pricing, and free-tier links.

tools.name: extract_url
tools.description: Extract structured JSON from a permitted public URL with explicit blocked-page errors.

tools.name: extract_article
tools.description: Extract article fields when the article is publicly accessible.

tools.name: extract_metadata
tools.description: Extract page metadata, Open Graph tags, Twitter Card tags, and canonical URL.
